<!-- 感謝貢獻！請填寫以下欄位。 / Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## 變更內容與原因 / What & why

<!-- 這個 PR 改了什麼、解決什麼問題？可用 #123 連結相關 issue。 -->
<!-- What does this PR change, and what problem does it solve? Link issues with #123. -->

## 變更類型 / Type of change

- [ ] 修正 bug / Bug fix
- [ ] 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 重構／工具 / Refactor / tooling
- [ ] 文件 / Documentation

## 如何測試？ / How was this tested?

<!-- 哪些站台/nindex、哪些瀏覽器（Chrome/Edge/Firefox/Safari）、驗證了什麼？ -->
<!-- Which sites/nindex, which browsers, and what did you verify? -->

- 瀏覽器 / Browser(s):
- 站台／情境 / Site(s) / scenario:
- 步驟 / Steps:

## 檢查清單 / Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` 成功且擴充功能可未封裝載入 / builds and loads unpacked
- [ ] 未加入任何機密、私鑰或內部 endpoint / No secrets, private keys, or internal endpoints
- [ ] Commit 訊息符合 [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] 若行為或架構改變，已更新文件 / Docs updated if behavior or architecture changed
